message:
feat(bubbles): Add Model trait implementations for Cursor, TextInput, and TextArea

- Cursor: Implement Model trait with blink command on init when focused
- TextInput: Implement Model trait with blink command on init when focused
- TextArea: Implement Model trait with blink command on init when focused

All three components now implement Model + Send + 'static bounds, enabling
standalone usage in bubbletea applications.

Includes comprehensive unit tests for Model trait implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
